response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering experience and leadership, but his resume lacks direct evidence of JVM tooling, IDE internals, or enterprise Java/Kotlin development. His background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and D language, with only a small mention of Java. His open-source work and talks are impressive but do not align closely with the IDE/JVM tooling domain.
strengths: Proven leadership and mentorship in software engineering teams
Extensive experience with test-driven development (TDD) and clean architecture
Strong communication skills and experience with developer tooling and automation
concerns: Limited or no direct experience with Java/Kotlin IDE internals or enterprise frameworks like Spring
No evidence of work on JVM tooling, build systems, or application server integration
Background heavily skewed toward web/mobile and D language, with minimal JVM-related projects
